summary: Planned one conservative non-mutating action for each of 40 hydrated open pull requests. This live inventory shard has no shared canonical; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-route action is recommended from the hydrated evidence. The #79273 validator security wording conflicts with the hydrated preflight artifact, which explicitly marks #79273 security_sensitive=false, so #79273 is retained as a non-mutating maintainer decision rather than routed to security.
